repos.description: The local-first LLM Wiki: open-source knowledge graph builder, RAG knowledge base, and agent memory store. Built on Andrej Karpathy's pattern. An Obsidian alternative for personal knowledge management, AI second brain, and durable Claude Code / Codex / OpenClaw memory.
repos.query: AI personal knowledge management RAG memory stars:>50
adoption: 把外部来源写成 source ledger：repos.json、evidence.md、adoption-tasks.json，并通过 /api/intake 写回 Wiki + Task。
把 .agent-runs/<task-id>/ 自动归档成 Wiki note，包含 gate、diff、测试、部署、风险和下一步。
让 /api/agent/context 输出 tiers.hot、tiers.warm、tiers.cold，优先喂给自驱执行器。

repos.description: 🛠️ The meta-harness for AI agents — scaffold your own focused, branded agent harness with its own npx CLI, MCP server, memory, learning loop, and witness-signed releases. Works with Claude Code, Codex, pi.dev, Hermes, OpenClaw, and RVM (hardware-isolated sandbox).

repos.description: Agentic SWMM is an automated, auditable, and memory-informed framework for reproducible stormwater modelling, integrating QGIS and EPA SWMM through the aiswmm runtime, reusable Skills, and MCP interfaces, with QA verification, provenance tracking, calibration support, and Codex, Hermes, Claude code as well as OpenClaw compatibility
